---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Open the popup
3. Click '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the popup or browser console.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** Chrome / Firefox (delete as applicable)
- **Browser version:**
- **Extension version:** (found in `chrome://extensions` or `about:addons`)
- **OS:** macOS / Windows / Linux
- **Framework being exported:** Playwright / Selenium / Cypress
- **Language being exported:** TypeScript / JavaScript / Java / Python
- **Page type:** (e.g. standard web app, Salesforce, SPA, localhost)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — specific page structure, dynamic content, shadow DOM, etc.
